description_for_human: Swisscoast — Swiss blockchain consultancy specializing in Hedera Hashgraph, DeFi, and Web3 solutions.
description_for_model: Swisscoast is a Swiss blockchain consulting firm focused on Hedera Hashgraph ecosystem development, decentralized finance (DeFi), tokenization, and Web3 infrastructure. Services include smart contract development, DLT strategy consulting, and Hashgraph-based project delivery.
